title: Optimal Stopping
description: Solve the secretary problem and its relatives: when to stop searching and commit. The 37% rule, marriage problem, house-hunting, and parking — all instances of one clean threshold strategy derived from first principles.
persona: For curious decision-makers. No prerequisites beyond arithmetic; we build the threshold rule by watching candidates arrive and counting outcomes.
tagline: Know when to commit for the best outcome.

lessons.title: No Going Back
lessons.summary: Irrevocable choice: every blind rule caps at 1/n.

lessons.title: Look, Then Leap
lessons.summary: Reject a few as scouts, then pounce — and beat 1/n.

lessons.title: The 37% Rule
lessons.summary: Cutoff fraction and success both converge to 1/e.

lessons.title: Why 37% Works
lessons.summary: Derive the success formula from the position decomposition.

lessons.title: Stopping in the Wild
lessons.summary: One rule for hiring, apartments, dating, and parking.
